title: Incident: Request Latency Spike
description: Request latency increased 20x starting at 14:32:00 UTC

timeline.14:31:50: Deployment of new database query optimization (contains bug)
timeline.14:32:00: Latency spike begins, p95 jumps from 100ms to 1850ms
timeline.14:33:00: Spike continues at 2100ms, on-call engineer alerted

root_cause: Deployment at 14:31:50 introduced a slow database query that was not caught in testing
detection_difficulty: The current PromQL query with increase() and [1m] window makes the spike hard to see in graphs
